name: Tuna Stroganoff
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Water-packed tuna (7 oz each), drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Chill the chicken broth until the fat solidifies at the top.
2. Remove and discard the hardened fat.
3. In a saucepan, combine the flour with the drained tuna liquid.
4. Gradually stir in the broth while cooking over low heat, stirring constantly.
5. Continue stirring until the mixture thickens.
6. Stir in the tomato sauce, onions, mushrooms, parsley, and tuna.
7. Cover the pot and simmer until heated through.
8. Stir in the yogurt and continue cooking just until hot; do not boil.
9. Serve 8 portions. Per serving: Calories--116.3 Carbohydrate--9.1 grams Fat--1.1 grams
